title: WU_SHUANGCB's Zombie Skin, but with TH
description: Destructible WU_SHUANGCB zombie skin texture to make it more immersive!
body:
**描述**：
计划用于在我的模组包中，但现在它们被提前释放。
使 [WU_SHUANGCB's Zombie Skin](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/wu_shuangcbs-zombie-skin)更具沉浸感，可以在curseforge上给出你的意见。

![受重伤的尸壳](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8b326ef30460e40a04122ca44d2560d475320a2e.jpeg)

**特性**：适用于 Minecraft 的 WU_SHUANGCB's Zombie Skin,but with TH（1.18.2至1.21）此资源包需要[Entity Model Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) 方式运行！并确保您使用的是最新版。

**安装方式**：需要先安装WU_SHUANGCB's Zombie Skin 才能带来更好的体验，此资源包会根据生命值动态更改僵尸，尸壳，溺尸的皮肤材质，材质也会受位置影响你最好这样摆放它们。

![确保本材质置于最顶](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a1f9df527ccac57717e61218eafc62e0c0954d9f.jpeg)

**兼容性**：目前新增了[CrimsonSteve's more mobs](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/crimsonsteves-more-mobs)和[Mutant More](https://modrinth.com/mod/new-mutant-more)还有[Alex's Mobs](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/alexs-mobs)模组的部分怪物纹理。不兼容Fresh Animations 但该项目有一个使用Fresh Animations 的版本[在这里](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/wu_shuangcbs-zombie-skin-th,-but-with-fa)。目前只有一些僵尸的破坏效果，也不兼容Torturable Healthbars, but with FA 兼容Torturable Healthbars 想要更好的体验[请移步](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/torturable-healthbars)，未来将会兼容更多生物。

**已知问题**：与optifine一起运行时不会工作。

**功劳**：[EnderBC](https://modrinth.com/user/EnderBC)原始项目

![实体纹理特性](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8acb9763063226da407072ec6b8c2bb456cdefa1.png)
![https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/wu-shuangcbs-zombie-skin-but-with-th](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/179b02671baadb7fc6299bc179fe48d7aab09077.png)

**Description**: 
Planned to be used in my modpack, but they are now released early.
Makes [WU_SHUANGCB's Zombie Skin](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/wu_shuangcbs-zombie-skin) more immersive, and you can give your opinions on curseforge.

![Seriously injured husk](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8b326ef30460e40a04122ca44d2560d475320a2e.jpeg)

**Features**: Applies to Minecraft's WU_SHUANGCB's Zombie Skin, but with TH (1.18.2 to 1.21) This resource pack requires [Entity Model Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) to run! And make sure you are using the latest version.

**Installation method**: You need to install WU_SHUANGCB's Zombie Skin first to have a better experience. This resource pack dynamically changes the skin texture of zombies, husk and drowned based on their health points. The texture is also affected by position, so you'd better place them like this. ![Make sure this texture is at the top](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a1f9df527ccac57717e61218eafc62e0c0954d9f.jpeg)

**Compatibility**: Currently added [CrimsonSteve's more mobs](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/crimsonsteves-more-mobs) and [Mutant More](https://modrinth.com/mod/new-mutant-more) and some of the mobs textures from the [Alex's Mobs](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/alexs-mobs). Not compatible with Fresh Animations, but there is a version that uses Fresh Animations [here](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/wu_shuangcbs-zombie-skin-th,-but-with-fa). Currently, it only has some zombie destruction effects and is not compatible with Torturable Healthbars FA, it is compatible with Torturable Healthbars. For a better experience [please go here](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/torturable-healthbars)！ and in the future it will be compatible with more creatures.

**Other credits**：[EnderBC](https://modrinth.com/user/EnderBC) Original project

**Known issues**: It does not work when running with optifine.

![Entity Texture Features](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8acb9763063226da407072ec6b8c2bb456cdefa1.png)
![https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/wu-shuangcbs-zombie-skin-but-with-th](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/179b02671baadb7fc6299bc179fe48d7aab09077.png)
